case_title: SHACKELFORD ROBERT D. VS PIOMBO RICHARD JR. DBA PIOMBO CONSTRUCTION CO.

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHACKELFORD ROBERT D. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PIOMBO RICHARD JR. DBA PIOMBO CONSTRUCTION CO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY PIOMBO RICHARD JR. DBA PIOMBO CONSTRUCTION CO. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SHACKELFORD ROBERT D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT PIOMBO RICHARD JR. DBA PIOMBO CONSTRUCTION CO. RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT SHACKELFORD ROBERT D. $1,775.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,775.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
